def negative_django_n_plus_one_no_select_related():
    rule_id = "django_n_plus_one_no_select_related"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Django queryset iteration shows N+1 risk with no visible select_related(...) or prefetch_related(...)."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
